chapter_title.en: Chapter on Companions in Travel and the Obligation of Mutual Rights Among Them

text: 2438 - وَ قَالَ أَمِيرُ اَلْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «لاَ تَصْحَبَنَّ فِي سَفَرٍ مَنْ لاَ يَرَى لَكَ مِنَ اَلْفَضْلِ عَلَيْهِ كَمَا تَرَى لَهُ عَلَيْكَ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2438 - Commander of the Faithful Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) said:
"Do not accompany in travel anyone who does not regard you with the same esteem that you regard them."
